canvas: 2560x1440px, 16:9 aspect ratio — keep all important content inside the centered safe zone (roughly the middle 1546x423px band, since YouTube crops the banner differently on desktop/TV/mobile)
how_to_use: Paste `prompt_text` directly into Gemini as the image prompt. `prompt_spec` is the same content broken into fields for reference/tweaking — Gemini reads it as plain text, not a parsed schema.

brand_constants.background: #111111 (flat near-black, absolutely no gradient or vignette)
brand_constants.primary_accent: #A855F7 (flat matte purple, single solid fill, no gradient)
brand_constants.shadow_accent: #6D28D9 (darker flat purple, hard-edged offset shadow duplicate only, never blurred)
brand_constants.outline_color: #F5F0FF (near-white, single continuous outline around the whole icon shape)
brand_constants.typography: JetBrains Mono or equivalent geometric monospace, extra-bold/black weight, terminal-inspired but NOT glowing or neon
required_style_terms: minimalist app-icon quality like Notion, Linear, or Vercel's icon set

prompt_text: A wide flat vector brand banner, 2560x1440px, on a perfectly solid flat near-black background (#111111, no gradient, no vignette, no texture), designed so all key content sits inside a centered horizontal safe-zone band roughly 1546px wide and 423px tall in the middle of the frame — nothing important near the far edges. Inside that safe zone, left-aligned as a group: on the left, a small flat vector icon of a literal four-pronged dinner fork — four equal vertical rounded-rectangle tines joined by a horizontal rounded-rectangle neck bar, connecting to one vertical rounded-rectangle handle — filled in flat matte purple (#A855F7), with one continuous near-white (#F5F0FF) outline around the whole silhouette (no internal seams between tines/neck/handle), and a hard offset flat shadow duplicate in dark purple (#6D28D9) behind it, crisp edge, no glow, no blur. Immediately to the right of the icon, bold extra-heavy monospace text reading 'fork.ai' — the word 'fork' and letters 'ai' in near-white (#F5F0FF), with the single period between them highlighted in the same flat purple (#A855F7) as the icon, set in a JetBrains-Mono-style geometric monospace font, tightly kerned, no glow or drop shadow on the text itself. Below the title, a single line of smaller monospace text in muted gray (#B8B8B8): 'AI & tech news, forked daily.' preceded by a small purple '>' terminal-prompt style arrow glyph in #A855F7. The entire composition is flat, high-contrast, and minimal — no glow, no gradient, no lens flare, no particle effects, no photographic elements, no additional graphics. The right two-thirds of the canvas remains empty solid #111111 background (this area gets cropped/obscured by YouTube's UI on different devices).

safe_zone.position: horizontally and vertically centered in the 2560x1440 canvas
safe_zone.rule: all logo + text content must stay inside this band

left_element.object: same 4-pronged fork icon as the logo asset, scaled down, positioned left-aligned inside the safe zone
left_element.outline: single continuous #F5F0FF outline around the whole merged silhouette, no per-segment seams
left_element.shadow: hard offset #6D28D9 silhouette duplicate, crisp edge, no blur

title_text.font: JetBrains Mono or equivalent geometric monospace, extra-bold/black weight
title_text.treatment: flat solid fill, no glow, no shadow, tight negative letter-spacing

subtitle_text.color: #B8B8B8 for the text, #A855F7 for the leading '>' glyph
subtitle_text.font: same monospace family, regular/medium weight, smaller size than title

prompt_spec.layout: icon + title stacked/aligned with subtitle beneath title, all left-aligned as one group inside the safe zone, generous empty negative space to the right
prompt_spec.negative_prompt: no gradients, no glow, no neon, no blur, no lens flare, no photographic background, no extra bullet lines, no extra taglines, no watermark, no stock-photo texture, no vignette
